overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a grimy bathroom and transitioning through a neon-lit cyberpunk city street before entering a building with red neon signage and descending a stairwell. The clip showcases the game's atmospheric lighting and detailed urban environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: grimy bathroom stall with toilet and graffiti

agents.ego_description: standing in a bathroom stall looking at the toilet and surroundings

entered.detail: grimy white toilet with the seat up in a small enclosed stall
poster on the wall with the word FIXER and a figure wearing sunglasses
newspaper or magazine scattered on the metal floor
weathered teal-colored metal walls with scratches and rust

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a small, grimy bathroom stall with teal metal walls. A toilet with the seat up sits in the center, while a poster labeled FIXER hangs on the right wall. The lighting is dim and greenish-yellow, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: public restroom with urinals and sinks

events.description: exits the bathroom stall into the main restroom area with urinals

agents.ego_description: moving through the public restroom past urinals and sinks toward the exit

entered.detail: row of white urinals with red indicator lights above them
three wall-mounted sinks with mirrors above them
metal exit door with horizontal push bar
tall metal locker cabinets against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the stall and moves through a larger bathroom area featuring a row of urinals with red lights on the left and sinks at the back. The floor is wet and littered with trash, and metal lockers line the left wall as the camera approaches the exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk city street with neon signage

events.description: exits the bathroom into the rainy cyberpunk street with bright neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet cyberpunk city sidewalk past neon signs and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in tank top walking past the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall buildings with multiple levels of neon advertisements and signage
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting the neon lights
red and white vending machine on the sidewalk
large red neon signs with Japanese characters on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a rainy cyberpunk city street at night. The camera walks along a wet sidewalk lined with towering buildings covered in bright neon signs and advertisements. Pedestrians walk past, and a vending machine stands on the right as the camera moves through the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: building lobby with large red neon sign

events.description: enters the building lobby featuring a massive red neon sign reading JOY HELL

agents.ego_description: entering the lobby of a building with a large red neon sign and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near the back wall of the lobby

entered.detail: massive red neon sign with Japanese characters and the word HELL in English
concrete benches on either side of the lobby entrance
large industrial fan unit mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a building lobby dominated by a massive red neon sign reading JOY HELL in both Japanese and English. The lobby floor is littered with trash and papers, and a group of people stands near the back wall. Industrial ventilation units and concrete benches line the sides of the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stairwell with red neon lighting

events.description: enters a narrow stairwell illuminated entirely by red neon lights
begins descending the metal stairs downward

agents.ego_description: descending a narrow stairwell illuminated by intense red neon lighting

entered.detail: vertical red neon light strips running along the walls of the stairwell
metal stairs with diamond plate treads descending into darkness
circular industrial ventilation fan mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, claustrophobic stairwell bathed in intense red neon light. Vertical red neon tubes line the walls as the camera descends the metal staircase downward. An industrial ventilation fan is visible on the wall, and the space feels confined and atmospheric.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, grimy interior into a sprawling neon city before descending into a saturated red industrial space. It begins inside a dim, greenish-yellow bathroom stall with teal metal walls, moving past wet floors, urinals, and lockers toward the exit. As the camera steps outside, the environment abruptly opens into a rainy cyberpunk street at night, where the camera navigates a wet sidewalk beneath towering buildings and bright advertisements. The scene then shifts indoors as the camera enters a trash-strewn lobby dominated by a massive red neon sign reading JOY HELL. Finally, the space narrows again as the camera moves into a confined stairwell, descending a metal staircase bathed in the intense glow of vertical red neon tubes.
